author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — both architectural (subagent split, owner-level) and FORBIDDEN-file (src/subagent.rs reserved scope).

**Fix outline:** Split src/subagent.rs (1486 lines) into a module tree:
- subagent/mod.rs — public API + AgentType enum
- subagent/manager.rs — BackgroundAgentManager + (now-injectable, see #739) registry
- subagent/transcript.rs — TRANSCRIPT_STORE + TTL eviction
- subagent/worktree.rs — WorktreeIsolation
- subagent/runner.rs — run_subagent loop (decomposed per #725)
- subagent/prompts.rs — AgentType system prompts + allowed_tools
- subagent/tools.rs — tool JSON + dispatch glue
Also remove transform_to_anthropic / transform_from_anthropic — already done in commit cde77d7b (#407: subagent uses ProviderAdapter trait instead of duplicate transforms).

**Partial progress already landed:**
- cde77d7b: subagent now delegates request/response shaping to the providers.rs adapter trait.
- b786593b, a698afd4: provider adapter dispatch made static and consistent.

**Blocking:** src/subagent.rs is reserved scope AND owner-level architectural call. This issue is the umbrella for the file split itself — close until a dedicated unrestricted pass.
